address.streetAddress: Ooty House, 45, Dr Rajendra Prasad Rd, near Fatima church, 2nd Street Extension, Doctor's Colony, Gandhipuram, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641012

itemListElement.reviewBody: After a long gap from my professional career when I joined here for the Advanced Montessori Course, I had  so many doubts, but the confidence, guidance and support that our Principal Ramya mam and the staff gave me was incredible. Just a few words are not enough to thank her.  You can go inside as a normal homemaker or a woman with a career gap and come out a mont teacher with flying colours. My teaching experience with the kids was just as amazing as my training. Thank you mam for everything and especially making me relish my college days once again at this age.

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Our kid is placed here for Pre School.An exemplary schooling system with one to one attenrion.This is  unique and very much supportive to kids.
Clean premises.

All Staff are humble to Chidren and Parents.

Daily Event feedbacks.

Kids made to involve in Cultural activities and event celebrations.

And so many pro features.

Kovai Kids Park is the par excellence centre for kids.

Kudos to Team.

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I highly recommend kovai kids to anyone looking for care & education. My daughter loves going to this school which made my mornings a less stressful. I really like the teacher and the director's plan of handling their students. I wouldn't refer the school unless it was the best.

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I enrolled my child in the UKG tuition program at this exceptional tuition center. Despite attending a reputed school in Coimbatore, she struggled with basic letter identification. The pressure from her school added to my worries, especially as a working professional unable to focus solely on her studies. However, since joining this tuition center, her progress has been remarkable. I attribute her improvement to the unwavering commitment and active involvement provided by the tutors here. I am immensely grateful for their dedication and support. Without a doubt, I will wholeheartedly recommend this center to my friends.

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am very happy with Kovai kids park and the quality of education they provide for my kid. The teachers are very dedicated and caring, and they put a lot of effort into teaching and taking care of the kids. I can see the difference in my kid’s learning and development, and I am grateful for their guidance and support. All the very best to everyone at Kovai kids park, and especially the teachers. You are doing a phenomenal job!

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Hindi classes taken here are really great...my son is studying his school portions as well as preparing for Hindi sabha exams...they made him strong in basics so it's easy for him now and getting good marks in exams...thanq for ur constant support Ramya mam

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I thanks to first Ramya mam and Nadhini mam for full support and best teacher training institute 🥇🥇🏆🏆 thankyou so much for guideing me to improve my self in all the ways

Hi ! Everyone It's  a very gud place to study Montessori here ,Their way of teaching is very nice and easy to understand.

And they are very flexible  in our timing,
I'm sure that we can study here happily  with a peaceful environment.❤️

itemReviewed.name: Kovai Kids Park Institute and Preschool  - Gandhi Nagar

itemListElement.reviewBody: This place were I learnt lot about teaching .....nice co ordinaters ..and teachers...the way thay treat in class rooms was very politely.... altogether this coaching center is best for new born teachers....thank you ramya mam.nandhini mam and Avila mam....thank u so much for this beautiful journey in my life
